name: Hunter 20x20 Porch Shed Plan - A Rustic Retreat with Classic Gable Roof & Covered Outdoor Space
open_features: Generous 400 sq ft layout paired with a traditional peaked roof for improved drainage, structural durability, and added interior height.
Integrated porch creates a shaded entry, decorative focal point, and functional outdoor space for seating, staging, or relaxing.
Standard framing methods and classic gable roof construction make this plan approachable for experienced DIYers and professional builders alike.
Wide, unobstructed layout allows for workbenches, storage systems, office conversions, or recreational build-outs.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Hunter Gable Shed with Porch - a spacious 20x20 backyard structure designed for strength, versatility, and timeless curb appeal. Showcasing a classic gable roofline and a welcoming covered front porch, Hunter delivers 400 square feet of flexible interior space with the charm of a small cabin and the practicality of a high-capacity storage building. With its balanced roof pitch, clean architectural lines, and inviting porch presence, the 20x20 Hunt...
